title: asperula calabra
intro: Asperula calabra, also known as Calabrian Woodruff, is a species of flowering plant in the family Rubiaceae. It is a perennial herb with medicinal properties, traditionally used to treat digestive issues and as an anti-inflammatory agent. The plant's health benefits include its ability to ease digestive discomfort, reduce fever, and exhibit antioxidant properties, making it a valuable herb in folk medicine. Asperula calabra can be prepared as a herbal tea, infusion, or tincture to harness its medicinal properties and health benefits.
